SEARCH
Package com.myproject.MavenExamProject.model

Class Driver

java.lang.Object
com.myproject.MavenExamProject.model.Driver
public class Driver extends Object
Class responsible for database communication and operations (model). This includes operations for querying, inserting, and bulk importing data into the database.
Author:
Oda, Martin U

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Method
    Description

    Method that checks if the database connection is active and valid.
    ResultSet

    Method that executes an SQL SELECT query and returns a ResultSet containing the query results.

    Retrieves the next available film ID by querying the maximum film ID in the database and incrementing 1.

    Inserts a single film record into the database.

  • Constructor Details

    • Driver

      public Driver()

  • Method Details

    • checkConnection

      public boolean checkConnection()
      Method that checks if the database connection is active and valid.
      Returns:
      boolean, true if the database connection is active and valid, false otherwise.

    • executeSelectQuery

      public ResultSet executeSelectQuery(String sqlQuery) throws SQLException
      Method that executes an SQL SELECT query and returns a ResultSet containing the query results.
      Parameters:
      sqlQuery - The SQL query to execute.
      Returns:
      A ResultSet containing the results of the query.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If an error occurs while executing the query.

    • executeUpdateQuery

      public int executeUpdateQuery(String sqlQuery) throws SQLException
      Executes an SQL UPDATE query and returns the number of rows affected.
      Parameters:
      sqlQuery - The SQL query to execute.
      Returns:
      The number of rows affected by the query.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If an error occurs while executing the query.

    • insertFilmToDb

      public void insertFilmToDb(int filmId, String title, String description, int releaseYear, int languageId, Integer ogLanguageId, int rentalDuration, double rentalRate, int length, double replaceCost, String rating, String features, String dateTime) throws SQLException
      Inserts a single film record into the database.
      Parameters:
      filmId - The film ID.
      title - The title of the film.
      description - The description of the film.
      releaseYear - The release year of the film.
      languageId - The language ID for the film.
      ogLanguageId - The original language ID (nullable).
      rentalDuration - The rental duration in days.
      rentalRate - The rental rate.
      length - The length of the film in minutes.
      replaceCost - The replacement cost.
      rating - The rating of the film.
      features - The special features of the film.
      dateTime - The last update timestamp.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If an error occurs while inserting the record.

    • insertFilmCategory

      public void insertFilmCategory(int filmId, int categoryId) throws SQLException
      Inserts a mapping between a film and a category into the film_category table. The method establishes a connection to the database, prepares the SQL query, and executes it to associate the given film ID with the specified category ID.
      Parameters:
      filmId - the ID of the film to be associated with a category.
      categoryId - the ID of the category to be associated with the film.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • getNextFilmId

      public int getNextFilmId() throws SQLException
      Retrieves the next available film ID by querying the maximum film ID in the database and incrementing 1.
      Returns:
      The next available film ID.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If an error occurs while querying the database.

    • importCsvToDatabase

      public void importCsvToDatabase(File csvFile) throws IOException, SQLException
      Imports film data from a CSV file into the database. Each record in the CSV is inserted into the film and film_category tables.
      Parameters:
      csvFile - The CSV file containing the film data.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs while reading the file.
      SQLException - If an error occurs while inserting data into the database.
